In Spanish, this live tracker of the Artemis II mission is insanely cool. The sci-fi design is *chef's kiss*

QuitGPT.org
🔗2026-04-05

It's not too late to undermine the ChatGPT supremacy 🤔 Also, good for QuitGPT.org for not simply boycotting, but also suggesting alternatives!:

Some higher privacy and open-source alternatives include: Lumo, Confer, Mistral, and LLaMA. Alternate corporate options include Gemini from Google and Claude from Anthropic.

The 49MB Web Page
🔗2026-04-04

The reader is not respected enough by the software. The publisher is held hostage by incentives from an auction system that not only encourages but also rewards dark patterns.

Why ‘Skinny’ Culture Is Back – and What It Means for Body Image and Mental Health
🔗2026-03-25

I don't know how I survived this bullshit in the 90s-00s, but it's back AGAIN, and it's so sad.

As much as I wish women would take hormones and body functioning into consideration regarding body size changes across the life span, ultimately allowing for a more compassionate stance toward their bodies, what I wish for more is a societal shift. Society’s view on women’s bodies and aging women is negative, objectifying and youth-obsessed. Until there is a societal change, there’s only so much an individual can do.

I am in an abusive relationship with the technology industry
via https://kevin-powell.kit.com/posts/ai-s-impact-on-those-working-in-tech
🔗2026-03-20

This week, I spoke to another friend about how their company is now mandating AI usage for all employees. There is no reason for this mandate, only that someone who knows someone said that at another company where everyone adopted AI they were able to fire all the software engineers and make bank. So if I’m reading this correctly, the message is: “You must adopt this tool, or you will be fired. But we’re going to fire you soon anyway. Good luck.”

:)

🔗2026-03-10

I already disliked Youtube's toast system; now I can still be a hater, but an informed hater!

The Mysterious Eugenics of Aesthetic Taste
via https://sweetfish.site/checkout/0226
🔗2026-03-08

Por encima de la eugénica científica prevalecerá la eugénica misteriosa del gusto estético. [Above scientific eugenics, the mysterious eugenics of aesthetic taste will prevail.]

—Jose Vasconcelos, La raza cósmica (1925)

via https://hisvirusness.com/linux
🔗2026-02-19

Will 2026 be the year of the Linux desktop?! I HOPE SO

You Don't Need to Log off, You Need to Become Sensual
🔗2026-02-16

What people want to replace you with is what they think you already are. If companies, bosses, and boyfriends want to replace you with a robot or an AI model, that’s because they already see you and what you do as simply the workings of a machine with far too many bugs.
